posts.title: Hosting UNIHACK 2025 in Patras
posts.excerpt: A recap of my experience hosting UNIHACK 2025 in Patras, Greece, including 6 challenges and successes of organizing a local hub in Patras.
excerpt_more: The event required coordinating logistics, challenge preparation, participant communication, and the on-site execution of the local hub.
Authored 6 Challenges of Foresnics and Miscellaneous categories.
